voice_observations.caption_text:
Estamos celebrando nuestro cumpleaños en Crumbl y saben que tenemos un exquisito menú para celebrarlo con ustedes!!! 🥳🎈 Sep 23–28 👇

Try our NEW shareable dessert—Confetti Celebration Cake! 🎉 A fluffy, three-tiered shareable cake batter confetti cake, layered with velvety vanilla buttercream and topped with rainbow confetti sprinkles. It’s your ticket to an unforgettable party. ✨

🎂 BIRTHDAY CAKE FT. OREO®
A thick cookie made with OREO® cookie pieces, covered in cake batter cream cheese frosting and topped with more OREO® cookie pieces and rainbow sprinkles.

🎊 CONFETTI CAKE (NEW)
Two fluffy tiers of cake batter confetti cake generously layered with smooth vanilla buttercream and crowned with a dash of vibrant rainbow sprinkles.

🍫 CARAMEL SHORTBREAD FT. TWIX®
A shortbread-inspired cookie filled with TWIX® pieces, then topped with a gooey layer of caramel, chilly milk chocolate, and crunchy chopped TWIX® pieces.

💕 THE ORIGINAL PINK SUGAR
Our original recipe is back! An almond sugar cookie topped with a perfect pink swoop of real almond frosting.

🥜 PEANUT BUTTER FT. SNICKERS®
A peanut butter cookie studded with chopped SNICKERS®, topped with caramel buttercream, a sprinkle of delicious SNICKERS® pieces, and a smooth milk chocolate drizzle.

🍪 MILK CHOCOLATE CHIP
The classic—you can’t go wrong. Thick, soft, and packed with milk chocolate chips.

It may be Mini Mondays™ tomorrow... but Minis are now available all week long! 🗣️
voice_observations.hook_text: Estamos celebrando nuestro cumpleaños en Crumbl
